_publications._publicationTitle: CDK4/6-MEK Inhibition in MPNSTs Causes Plasma Cell Infiltration, Sensitization to PD-L1 Blockade, and Tumor Regression.

_contextSnippet: In the comparison between vehicle and resistant tumors, 423 genes were differentially expressed, whereas sensitive tumors displayed 1,461 DEGs relative to vehicle and 244 DEGs compared to resistant tumors
details: Identified differentially expressed genes with 423 genes between vehicle and resistant tumors, 1,461 DEGs in sensitive tumors relative to vehicle, and 244 DEGs between sensitive and resistant tumors
